{{Quote|It may seem hopeless, but I see only success.|Bora Boru|<ref name="Smugglers of the Outer Rim">{{JournalCite|5|Smugglers of the Outer Rim}}</ref>}}
'''Bora Boru''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Bosph (species)|Bosph]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] who operated in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].

==Biography==
He held the Bosph title of [[Farseers|Farseer]], which was a Bosph [[The Force/Legends|Force]] tradition. The title gave him access to the Bosph philosophical teachings and a [[glyph]] of his own. In the tradition of the [[Bosph wanderer]]s called the [[way of the traveler]], Bora Boru's body was covered with [[Tattoo/Legends|tattoos]] of star maps. He disliked the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] ever since they destroyed his [[Bosph/Legends|homeworld]], at the same time pretending the bombardment never took place and trying to ignore the Empire. Such "[[disremembering]]" was the ultimate insult in Bosph culture.

===''Bosphon Forever''===
Being a "Farseer", Bora Boru had the right to take objects into possession by placing his glyph on them. That was how he obtained his [[Starship/Legends|ship]], the ''[[Bosphon Forever]]'', much to the dislike of its original owner, whom Boru had to kill to defend his newly-acquired possession. Bora Boru's ship was coated with glyphs, and on the inside, tales of the Bosph, as well as his own exploits were rendered on the walls of the hull. No one was allowed unguarded into the ship unless they were truly trusted.

==Personality and traits==
Bora Boru was slow and contemplative, but still a highly effective [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]]. He was able to analyze any situation from multiple levels within a few moments. He had a tendency to sympathize with colleagues and customers who disliked the Empire, and was known to do jobs that were specifically damaging to the Empire for free. Bora Boru was [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] and was able to use the [[Force power/Legends|Force powers]] practiced in the Farseer tradition. Because of his Force-sensitivity, he lived beyond the standard life span of the Bosph. He never performed any outright evil actions, though he was unacquainted with the [[Jedi Code/Legends|Jedi Code]] and had never met a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]].
